string.text:
The M32 Grenade Launcher is a versatile and powerful shoulder-fired weapon system used by military and law enforcement agencies worldwide. Also known as the M32 Multiple Grenade Launcher (MGL), it is renowned for its rapid firepower and effectiveness in combat situations. Designed to swiftly deliver a barrage of explosive firepower, the M32 can hold multiple 40mm grenades in a revolving cylinder, allowing for quick succession of shots without the need for manual reloading. Its lightweight and portable design make it suitable for various tactical operations, including infantry support, crowd control, and perimeter defense. With a simple yet efficient mechanism, the M32 Grenade Launcher provides military personnel and law enforcement officers with a reliable and potent tool for engaging enemies and ensuring the safety of personnel in the field.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most red dot sights for Picatinny/weaver
